channel.title: Website on nehwe.tech — Cybersecurity, Web Design & AI Automation in Colorado Springs, CO
channel.description: Recent content in Website on nehwe.tech — Cybersecurity, Web Design & AI Automation in Colorado Springs, CO

item.title: Secure Site Rebuild for a Local Professional Services Firm
item.description: Beyond the speed and security wins, the client’s team can now edit content directly in Markdown without touching a page builder — which means fewer accidental layout breaks and no more waiting on a developer for a simple text change.
